title: NGFR-mNG2 Sorting Protocol
author: Benjamin Emert
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.rh6d39e

steps.title: Wash 5 confluent 10cm plates with...
steps.instruction: Wash 5 confluent 10cm plates with 1xDPBS For the NGFR-mNG2 WM989 A6-G3 cell lines you can expect 4-5 million cells on a confluent 10cm dish. Scale up the number of starting plates accordingly.

steps.title: Aspirate 1xDPBS and add 2mL 0
steps.instruction: Aspirate 1xDPBS and add 2mL 0.05% Trypsin-EDTA. Incubate at 37ºC for 3-5 minutes. undetermined, 0.05% Trypsin EDTA Undetermined, incubate 00:03:00, incubate

steps.title: Neutralize trypsin with 4mL TU2% media
steps.instruction: Neutralize trypsin with 4mL TU2% media. Transfer dissociated cells to 15mL falcon tube. undetermined, TU2% media Can use 1 15mL falcon tube for 2.5 10cm plates. Or scale down the volume of trypsin and media to fit more cells into fewer tubes.

steps.title: Pellet cells by centrifugation at 1,000...
steps.instruction: Pellet cells by centrifugation at 1,000 rpm (200rcf) for 3 minutes. 00:03:00, Centrifugation During centrifugation, prepare sterile 1xDPBS with 2mM EDTA. Prepare excess. Alternatively, can centrifuge at 300 rcf

steps.title: Resuspend cell pellet in 5mL 1xDPBS with 2mM EDTA
steps.instruction: Resuspend cell pellet in 5mL 1xDPBS with 2mM EDTA. undetermined, 1xDPBS with 2mM EDTA Can combine pellets at this point

steps.title: Pellet cells by centrifugation at 1,000...
steps.instruction: Pellet cells by centrifugation at 1,000 rpm (200rcf) for 3 minutes. 00:03:00, Centrifugation During centrifugation prepare 1xDPBS with 2mM EDTA and live dead staining solution. I use one of the following: 4uL/mL 7-AAD (final concentration 200ng/mL) 2uL/mL Propidium iodide (final concentration 100ng/mL) 1uL/mL DAPI (final concentration 50ng/mL). Prepare excess for diluting cells if necessary. During centrifugation prepare sterile 5mL polypropylene FACS tubes with 1mL TU2% for collecting sorted cells.

steps.title: Resuspend cell pellets in 1xDPBS with...
steps.instruction: Resuspend cell pellets in 1xDPBS with 2mM EDTA and dead cell stain. I will typically use 6mL for 5-10cm plate's worth of cells.

steps.title: Remove cell clumps by passing cell...
steps.instruction: Remove cell clumps by passing cell suspension through cell strainer cap into sterile 5mL polypropylene FACS tubes. Place tubes on ice.

steps.title: Bring with you the following
steps.instruction: Bring with you the following: 1xDPBS with 2mM EDTA and dead cell stain for diluting cells 5mL polypropylene FACS tubes with 1mL TU2% for collecting cells Excess FACS tubes and media
